ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that captured the data */,
  "capture_index" INTEGER /* Index of the capture */,
  "system_time" TEXT /* System time when the data was captured */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "global_avg" REAL /* Global average value */,
  "global_sum" REAL /* Global sum value */,
  "roi_avg_without_black_level" REAL /* Average value without black level */,
  "roi_sum_without_black_level" REAL /* Sum value without black level */,
  "roi_avg" REAL /* Average value */,
  "roi_sum" REAL /* Sum value */,
  "roi_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the region of interest */,
  "roi_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the region of interest */,
  "roi_width" INTEGER /* Width of the region of interest */,
  "roi_height" INTEGER /* Height of the region of interest */,
  "cx" REAL /* Center X-coordinate */,
  "cy" REAL /* Center Y-coordinate */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region of interest */,
  "group_time" INTEGER /* Group time */,
  "single_time" INTEGER /* Single time */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Validity of the data (e.g., valid, invalid, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor group (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_group_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor group */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was mapped to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_group_mapping_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_group_mapping_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES sensor_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., maintenance, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., Celsius, Pascal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_recipients_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
